title: NewsPortal Business Metrics
description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for NewsPortal application

panels.title: Request Rate Over Time
panels.description: HTTP request rate by status code class

panels.title: PG Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Buffer cache hit ratio (higher is better)

panels.description: Total live rows across all tables

panels.description: Database transaction commit and rollback rates

panels.description: Row operation rates (insert, update, delete, fetch)

panels.title: Mongo Data Size
panels.description: Total data size across all databases
